categories.name: NLP Engine — Slang & Normalisation
categories.description: Validates slang mapping, normalisation pipeline, aspect routing, and negation handling

tests.description: 'prof is chill' maps to Positive Teaching Quality
tests.mechanism: SLANG_MAP: prof→professor, chill→good; triggers Teaching Quality via 'professor'

tests.description: 'exams are brutal' maps to Negative Assessment & Evaluation
tests.mechanism: SLANG_MAP: brutal→very bad; triggers Assessment via 'exams'; 'very bad' is strong_negative

tests.description: 'labs are useless' maps to Negative Practical & Lab
tests.mechanism: SLANG_MAP: useless→bad; triggers Practical via 'labs'; strong_negative match

tests.description: 'mid' normalises to 'average' in SLANG_MAP
'lit' normalises to 'excellent' in SLANG_MAP
Negation pattern prevents 'not helpful TAs' from resolving Positive
tests.mechanism: NEGATION_PATTERN matches 'not'; pos_score *= 0.2 reduces Positive signal

categories.name: Bulk CSV Processing
categories.description: End-to-end batch ingestion: row count, column validation, skip logic, and output schema

tests.description: 14-row sample CSV produces exactly 14 results
CSV missing 'feedback' column is detected as invalid
tests.expected_behavior: Error message shown; analysis not attempted

tests.description: Short feedback entries (<=10 chars) are skipped
input: The professor explains concepts really well, fair exams.

tests.description: Each bulk result contains all required output keys
All overall_score values fall within 10–100 range

categories.name: Dashboard Charts & Visualisations
categories.description: Validates data structures that power Plotly charts and KPI metric cards

tests.description: Sentiment distribution totals match total feedback count
All overall scores are within the valid 10–95 range
Aspect aggregator contains all 7 analysis dimensions
Faculty stats are sorted by avg score descending
tests.expected_behavior: DataFrame sorted ascending=False on Avg Score column

tests.description: Satisfaction gauge uses correct colour thresholds

categories.name: Sample Dataset & Interactive Loading
categories.description: Validates the built-in sample dataset schema and full pipeline execution

tests.description: 'Load Sample Dataset' populates exactly 14 rows
Sample CSV contains all four required columns
'Analyze Sample Data' runs full pipeline and populates all insights

categories.name: Multi-Aspect Analysis & Filtering
categories.description: Contrast clause splitting, multi-aspect detection, and filter_bulk_results correctness

tests.description: Mixed feedback triggers 3 or more distinct aspects
tests.input: Great teaching, terrible labs, helpful TAs

tests.description: Contrast detection splits 'but' clause into Positive + Negative
tests.input: Professor explains very well but exams are too hard and grading is unfair
tests.mechanism: split_into_clauses splits on '\s+but\s+'; each clause scored independently

tests.description: Faculty filter 'Dr. Garcia' returns exactly 1 result
Course filter 'CS101' returns only CS101 rows

categories.name: Export & End-to-End Pipeline
categories.description: CSV export schema validation and round-trip integrity check

tests.description: Exported CSV contains all required display columns and survives round-trip
tests.expected_behavior: Row count and column set identical before and after CSV serialisation

edge_cases.description: Empty string input returns empty dict
calculate_overall_score returns None for empty input
